tweets.text:
2021 marketing:
> $30k/mo agency retainer
> $20k/mo media buyer
> 3 weeks to make one ad
> 5 ads live per month if you're lucky

2026 marketing:
> AI tools like Tempo
> plugged into shopify + meta
> 100s of ads/wk trained on your winning catalog and every winning competitor ad
> https://t.co/riPyPXI8bi

Real reason most brands don't scale:

They find 1 winning creative and milk it until it dies.

Instead of building a system that finds the next one.

Ur creative will get ripped and stop working.

Ur testing system won't.

If ur young, DO NOT DO THIS.

Put ur money in index funds: SPY & QQQ

Every month take ur biz profits OUT OF UR BIZ ACCOUNT and buy more SPY & QQQ

Dont touch it and wake up 20 years later with $100m+ 

This is the way 🥷
